title: chamaebetula rotundifolia
intro: Chamaebetula rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved birch or Chamaebatiaria, is a shrub native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and preventing oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Chamaebetula rotundifolia include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
